message:
feat(og): add dynamic OG images for social sharing

Add per-route Open Graph and Twitter card images using next/og:
- Root: Abstract hexagonal network icon with blue/purple gradient
- About: Journey/milestone path visualization with emerald/teal theme
- Projects: Code window with git branch lines in orange/amber
- TLDR: Flywheel diagram matching agent-flywheel.com style
- Writing: Document with floating cards in pink/indigo

All images use edge runtime for dynamic generation with:
- Gradient backgrounds with glowing orb effects
- Consistent visual language across routes
- Proper sizing (1200x630 OG, 1200x600 Twitter)
- Domain/route labels for context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,372 @@ +import { ImageResponse } from "next/og"; + +export const runtime = "edge"; + +export const alt = "About Jeffrey Emanuel - Background, Experience & Philosophy"; +export const size = { + width: 1200, + height: 630, +}; +export const contentType = "image/png"; + +export default async function Image() { + return new ImageResponse( + ( +
+ {/* Grid pattern */} +
+ + {/* Glowing orb - emerald top left */} +
+ + {/* Glowing orb - teal bottom right */} +
+ + {/* Accent orb - blue center */} +
+ + {/* Main content */} +
+ {/* Left side - Person/Story icon */} +
+ {/* Outer glow */} +
+ + {/* Story/Journey SVG - Abstract path/timeline representation */} + +
+ + {/* Right side - Text content */} +
+ {/* Page label */} +
+ + About + +
+ + {/* Title */} +

+ Jeffrey Emanuel +

+ + {/* Subtitle */} +

+ The Story Behind the Code +

+ + {/* Description */} +

+ From Yale economics to AI engineering - a journey through finance, + startups, and building systems that amplify human intelligence +

+ + {/* Tags */} +
+
+ + Background + +
+ +
+ + Experience + +
+ +
+ + Philosophy + +
+
+
+
+ + {/* Bottom gradient accent */} +
+ + {/* Domain */} +
+ jeffreyemanuel.com/about +
+
+ ), + { + ...size, + } + ); +}
